app_string_fncall_weave_prefix_header_s3:
WEAVE PREFIX
frame-01 :: let block chooses the opening panel
app_string_fncall_weave_prefix_footer_s3: frame-02 :: fncall layout should hang this whole text under the call
app_string_fncall_weave_body_block_s3^s3:
WEAVE BODY
segment-a :: match branch injects a multiline payload
segment-b :: BODY-MARKER proves the middle block survived
segment-c :: the viewer should show parentheses sized by height only
app_string_fncall_weave_divider_segment_: -- woven divider :: repeated to enlarge the middle argument --
app_string_fncall_weave_bool_true_block_:
BOOL TRUE BLOCK
branch :: true payload keeps the right side active
app_string_fncall_weave_bool_false_block:
BOOL FALSE BLOCK
branch :: false payload still renders as a multiline alternative
app_string_fncall_weave_fallback_tail_s3: TAIL :: fallback route closes the report
app_string_fncall_weave_match_tail_s3^s3: TAIL :: match-driven route closes the report
app_string_fncall_weave_echo_tail_s3^s3: TAIL :: echo route closes the report
app_string_fncall_weave_plain_tail_s3^s3: TAIL :: plain route closes the report
app_string_fncall_weave_bad_match_tail_s: fncall weave did not end with match tail
